ddt:Target.Name: DC4_X95_P5.20
ddt:Target.Description:
TCU BVA DC4
Version Soft : P5.20 and after (DiagOnCAN) Véhicule : X95 K9Ks4 DC4 October 2009
Authors : G. DALPONTE (gpdalponte@webmail.alten.fr), J. BUET (jbuet@webmail.alten.fr)
DED/DFS v2.8
History:
P5.11 - correction of request $1906000000FF for ExtendedData display - addition of request $22F180 "bootSoftwareIdentification" - modification of screen "CLUTCHES TEACH-IN": to be used only in case of MAM replacement or loss of teach-in values - addition of screen "CLUTCHES REPLACEMENT TEACH-IN": to be used only in case of clutch or gearbox replacement - modification of Default Coding from Little Endian to Big Endian - addition of requests $3B3301 and $3B3302
P5.20 - replacement of screen "CLUTCHES TEACH-IN" by screens "CLUTCHES TEACH-IN STEPS 1, 2, 3" - request $3B2500 substituted by $3B2501 and $3B2502 - request $3B2600 substituted by $3B2601 and $3B2602 - request $3B2700 substituted by $3B2701 and $3B2702 - request $3B2A00000000 substituted by $3B2A01000002 and $3B2A02000002 - request $3B2B00000000 substituted by $3B2B01000002 and $3B2B02000002 - request $3B2C00000000 substituted by $3B2C01000002 and $3B2C02000002 - request $3B2E00 substituted by $3B2E01 and $3B2E02 - addition of requests $3B2901000002, $3B2901000002, $3B2902000002, $3B2F01000002, $3B2F02000002, $3B3301000002 and $3B3302000002 - update of data resolution "green clutch counter" and "Green clutch flag" - addition of datas "Routine Response Code" and "Data Byte 1 to 6" - modification of requests $3101010001, $3101010002, $310301, $310501, $3105010001, $3105010002, $1306010001, $3106010002, $310701, $310801, $3109010001, $3109010001, $310E01, $310F01, $313E01, $316701, $313D01 - suppression of DIDs from $2D50 to $2E65 - suppression of most unused data - addition of DTC AAAA - screens "Reset Clutch Data", "Set Clutch Data", "Output Control" and "Clutches Replacement Teach-in" moved to Developpement section

Item.Text: Routine aborted due to an error
FM (Freq. Mod.) / PWM (Pulse Width Mod.) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Freq. Mod.) / PWM (Pulse Width Mod.) Failures
Circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
sig. bias lvl out of range / zero adjust. failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Comp. or system operation obstructed or blocked
Manual up/down switches at shift lever
MAM or gearbox mechanic part 1 unexpected shiftdrum standstill
MAM or gearbox mechanic part 2 unexpected shiftdrum standstill
MAM or gb mech part 1 or clu1 sync timeout
MAM or gb mech part 2 or clu2 sync timeout
CAN mean effective torque information invalid
CAN engine torque without GB request info. invalid

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: Mileage counter since last LH occured

Item.Text: Error plausibility between ISS1 and engine
Error plausibility between ISS2 and engine
Error plausibility between axle speed and OSS
shifter and TRS_0/1 are different to each other
Shift drum is in emergency state
Shift drum is in emergency state

Data.Name: Counter for Reverse gear engagement errors

Item.Text: Engine speed error (missing CAN / CAN error value)
Engine torque expected by driver error

Data.Name: Driving cycle counter since last LH occured
Misc switches.Misc switches
Data.Comment: paddle up, down, man up, down

Data.Name: Brake sw. Handbrake status.Hand Brake Status
Brake sw. Handbrake status.Hand Brake Status.Handbrake switch
Brake sw. Handbrake status.Brake sw. Handbrake status

Item.Text: Manual up/down switches at shift lever
MAM or gearbox mechanic part 1 unexpected shiftdrum standstill
MAM or gearbox mechanic part 2 unexpected shiftdrum standstill
MAM or gearbox mechanic part 1 or clutch 1 synchronization timeout
MAM or gearbox mechanic part 2 or clutch 2 synchronization timeout

Data.Name: Engine speed req
Data.Comment: Engine speed received on the CAN from ECM

Data.Name: Engine speed
Data.Comment: Engine speed received on the CAN from ECM

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery
Engine stopped by normal driver request 0000
Engine stopped by other causes xx1x
Engine stopped by normal system request x1xx
Insufficient reaction on input shaft speed
Input shaft speed gradient too high
Clutch not closed leads to timeout
Value in service data too low
Value in service data too high
System not in normal operation mode

Data.Name: Data Byte 1
Data.Comment: Actuator error status on shift drum 1

Data.Name: Data Byte 2
Data.Comment: Actuator error status on shift drum 2

Data.Name: Data Byte 3
Data.Comment: Reference drive error status on shift drum 1

Data.Name: Data Byte 4
Data.Comment: Reference drive error status on shift drum 2

Data.Name: Data Byte 5
Data.Comment: Encoder error status on shift drum 1

Item.Text: Setpoint for incremental encoder is out of range
Value of incremental encoder above upper limit
Value of incremental encoder below upper limit
Angular speed is out of range

Data.Name: Data Byte 6
Data.Comment: Encoder error status on shift drum 2

Item.Text: Setpoint for incremental encoder is out of range
Value of incremental encoder above upper limit
Value of incremental encoder below upper limit
Angular speed is out of range

DataItem.Name: Brake sw. Handbrake status.Hand Brake Status.Handbrake switch

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

DataItem.Name: Mileage counter since last LH occured
Driving cycle counter since last LH occured
Counter for Reverse gear engagement errors

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: sds_plausi_err_if
Request.Comment: Plausibility between ISS1/2 and engine, between axle speed and outputspeed, wheelspin at front axle

DataItem.Name: Counter for Reverse gear engagement errors

Request.Name: DataRead.Counter for Reverse gear engagement errors

DataItem.Name: Counter for Reverse gear engagement errors

Request.Name: DataRead.Mileage counter since last LH occured

DataItem.Name: Mileage counter since last LH occured

Request.Name: DataRead.Driving cycle counter since last LH occured

DataItem.Name: Driving cycle counter since last LH occured

Request.Name: Clutch 2 characteritics curve analysis and adaptation
Clutch 1 characteritics curve analysis and adaptation

DataItem.Name: Brake sw. Handbrake status.Brake sw. Handbrake status
Brake sw. Handbrake status.Hand Brake Status

Request.Name: DataRead.Brake sw. Handbrake status.Hand Brake Status

DataItem.Name: Brake sw. Handbrake status.Hand Brake Status.Handbrake switch

Request.Name: Read clutch 1 actuator load curve adaptive value in closing direction
Read clutch 2 actuator load curve adaptive value in closing direction
Read clutch actuator 1 load curve adaptive value in opening direction
Read clutch actuator 2 load curve adaptive value in opening direction
ClearDiagnosticInformation.Emission.relatedDTCs
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: Stop clutch actuator simultaneous position control
Stop reference TRS in shiftlever position P
Clutch actuator 1 position cycle control status
Clutch actuator 2 position cycle control status
Stop clutch actuator voltage cycle control
ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: Read clutch 1 max available actuator travel
Read clutch 1 passive self opening duration time
Read clutch 1 active self opening duration time
Read clutch 2 passive self opening duration time
Read clutch 2 active self opening duration time
Read clutch 2 max available actuator travel

DataItem.Name: Brake sw. Handbrake status.Brake sw. Handbrake status
Brake sw. Handbrake status.Hand Brake Status

Request.Name: Modify clutch 1 touchpoint value
Request.Comment: Modify clutch 1 touch point value to 7 mm

Request.Name: Modify clutch 2 touchpoint value
Request.Comment: Modify clutch 2 touch point value to 12 mm

Request.Name: Reset clutch 1 actuator load cuve adaptative value in opening direction
Reset clutch 2 actuator load cuve adaptative value in opening direction
Reset clutch 2 actuator load cuve adaptative value in closing direction
Reset clutch 1 actuator load cuve adaptative value in closing direction
Clutch characteritics curve analysis and adaptation status
Clutch actuator voltage cycle control status
Reference TRS in shiftlever position P
Reference TRS in shiftlever position P status
Clutch acuator simultaneous position control status

Device.Name: Manual up/down switches at shift lever
MAM or gearbox mechanic part 1 unexpected shiftdrum standstill
MAM or gearbox mechanic part 2 unexpected shiftdrum standstill
MAM or gb mech part 1 or clu1 sync timeout
MAM or gb mech part 2 or clu2 sync timeout

Send.RequestName: Reference TRS in shiftlever position P

Display.RequestName: Reference TRS in shiftlever position P status

Display.DataName: Mileage counter since last LH occured
Driving cycle counter since last LH occured
Counter for Reverse gear engagement errors
Brake sw. Handbrake status.Hand Brake Status.Handbrake switch
Counter for Reverse gear engagement errors

Display.RequestName: Read clutch actuator 2 load curve adaptive value in opening direction
Read clutch actuator 2 load curve adaptive value in opening direction
Read clutch actuator 2 load curve adaptive value in opening direction
Read clutch actuator 2 load curve adaptive value in opening direction
Read clutch actuator 2 load curve adaptive value in opening direction
Read clutch actuator 2 load curve adaptive value in opening direction
Read clutch actuator 2 load curve adaptive value in opening direction

Display.DataName: Brake sw. Handbrake status.Hand Brake Status

Display.RequestName: Read clutch actuator 1 load curve adaptive value in opening direction
Read clutch actuator 1 load curve adaptive value in opening direction
Read clutch actuator 1 load curve adaptive value in opening direction
Read clutch actuator 1 load curve adaptive value in opening direction
Read clutch actuator 1 load curve adaptive value in opening direction
Read clutch actuator 1 load curve adaptive value in opening direction
Read clutch actuator 1 load curve adaptive value in opening direction

Label.Text: This clutches teach-in sequence should be used only in case of MAM replacement or loss of teach-in values
For steps 1.01 to 1.10, press button once, wait 3 sec and press it once more

Button.Text: Reset clutch 1 actuator in opening direction (step 1.05)

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch 1 actuator load cuve adaptative value in opening direction

Button.Text: Reset clutch 2 actuator in opening direction (step 1.06)

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch 2 actuator load cuve adaptative value in opening direction

Button.Text: Reset clutch 1 actuator in closing direction (step 1.07)

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch 1 actuator load cuve adaptative value in closing direction

Button.Text: Reset clutch 2 actuator in closing direction (step 1.08)

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch 2 actuator load cuve adaptative value in closing direction

Label.Text: This clutches teach-in sequence should be used only in case of MAM replacement or loss of teach-in values
Wait 3 seconds before proceeding to step 2.1 so the gearbox shifts to neutral

Button.Text: End of step 2, if they were OK

Label.Text: This clutches teach-in sequence should be used only in case of MAM replacement or loss of teach-in values

Display.DataName: Counter for Reverse gear engagement errors
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Counter for Reverse gear engagement errors

Display.DataName: Mileage counter since last LH occured
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Mileage counter since last LH occured

Display.DataName: Brake sw. Handbrake status.Hand Brake Status
Brake sw. Handbrake status.Hand Brake Status.Handbrake switch
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Brake sw. Handbrake status.Hand Brake Status

Label.Text: LIMP HOME MODES FLAGS (NOT WORKING YET!)
THIS PROCEDURE IS TO BE USED ONLY IN CASE OF BAD TOUCH POINT ADAPTATION TEACH-IN
In order to activate step 2.2, press pedal to kick down
In order to activate step 2.1, press pedal to kick down
This clutches teach-in sequence should be used only in case of clutches or gearbox replacement
Press button, wait 2 sec and press it once more
Press button, wait 2 sec and press it once more

Button.Text: End of step 2 if both steps 2.1 and 2.2 were OK

Label.Text: Clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction
Clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction

Send.RequestName: Reset clutch 1 actuator load cuve adaptative value in opening direction
Reset clutch 1 actuator load cuve adaptative value in closing direction
